@graph.name: PRP Hair Treatment in Malaysia for Hair Loss, Scalp Health and Skin Rejuvenation
@graph.description: Hair loss responds to your own biology. PRP therapy uses platelet-rich plasma from your blood to stimulate hair follicles, stop hair shedding, and promote natural regrowth. Nexus Clinic KL offers PRP hair treatment in Malaysia for hair loss and skin care across Kuala Lumpur, Selangor, and KL. Book your consultation today.
